title: bridge-slack: no HTTP body size limit allows OOM
description: bridge-slack/src/bridge.rs slack_events() reads the entire request body into memory (axum Bytes extractor) before signature verification. No DefaultBodyLimit is set. An adversary can POST a multi-hundred-MB body to :9001/slack/events to OOM the process. Same issue: bridge-matrix as_transaction handler has no body limit. Fix: axum DefaultBodyLimit::max(N) on the Router.
